name: social-playbook-skill
description: Design and generate complete social media playbooks (scripts, visuals, captions, hooks, thumbnails, transitions) for Synthex clients across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Shorts/Reels. Use when planning multi-platform campaigns or content systems.
capabilities: Generates 10-30 video and post concepts per playbook
Creates platform-specific content variations for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Facebook
Designs thumbnail concepts with text overlays and visual styles
Plans weekly posting schedules with optimal time windows
Structures content for database storage and automation integration
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: All 27 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill contains only documentation files (skill-report.json, SKILL.md) with no executable code. The static analyzer incorrectly flagged pattern matches in metadata fields and documentation text. No network calls, file system threats, or code execution capabilities exist in this skill.
valueStatement: Stop struggling with social media content planning. This skill creates complete playbooks with scripts, visuals, and posting schedules for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Facebook in minutes. Transform one content idea into optimized posts across every major platform automatically.
userTitle: Generate Social Media Playbooks for Multi-Platform Campaigns
limitations: Requires existing marketing documentation for context and brand guidelines
Does not create actual video files or graphics - generates concepts only
Content must align with practical, no-hype brand tone

useCases.title: Onboard new clients quickly
useCases.description: Generate complete 30-day social media strategies for new clients across all major platforms in under 10 minutes.

useCases.title: Launch products effectively
useCases.description: Create platform-specific content that maximizes reach for product launches without expensive agencies.

useCases.title: Scale content across platforms
useCases.description: Turn one video idea into optimized content for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and LinkedIn automatically.

promptTemplates.title: New Client Playbook
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a social media playbook for a [industry] company targeting [audience]. Focus on [key services]. Include 20 video ideas with hooks, scripts, and thumbnail concepts.

promptTemplates.title: Product Launch Campaign
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a 6-week social media campaign for launching [product]. Create content for LinkedIn thought leadership, YouTube tutorials, and TikTok behind-the-scenes.

promptTemplates.title: Educational Series
promptTemplates.prompt: Develop a 30-day educational content series for a [profession] teaching [topic]. Include platform-specific variations for each post.

promptTemplates.title: Seasonal Promotion
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a comprehensive social media playbook for [business] [season] campaign. Include countdown content, product showcases, and deals across all platforms.

bestPractices: Always specify your target audience and industry for more relevant content ideas
Include your unique value proposition to differentiate from competitors
Review and customize the generated hooks to match your authentic voice
antiPatterns: Don't use generic prompts like make me viral content - be specific about your goals
Avoid copying competitor content exactly - use ideas as inspiration only
Don't schedule all content at once - leave room for trending topics and news

faq.question: Which platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: YouTube, TikTok, Instagram (Reels and carousels), LinkedIn, and Facebook. Each platform gets optimized content variations.

faq.question: How many content ideas will I get?
faq.answer: Each playbook generates 10-30 video and post concepts with platform-specific variations, hooks, scripts, and thumbnails.

faq.question: Can I integrate this with my existing tools?
faq.answer: Yes, content is structured for database storage and can connect to scheduling tools like Buffer, Hootsuite, or custom APIs.

faq.question: Is my client data safe?
faq.answer: The skill only uses information you provide and does not store or transmit data externally. All processing happens locally.

faq.question: What if the content does not match my brand?
faq.answer: Each playbook includes brand tone guidelines and can be customized. Review and adjust hooks to match your voice.

faq.question: How does this compare to hiring an agency?
faq.answer: Get agency-quality strategy in minutes instead of weeks, at a fraction of the cost, with unlimited revisions.
